title: meibomia zonata
intro: Meibomia zonata, also known as butterfly pea, is a flowering plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Meibomia zonata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Meibomia zonata can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
